channel.title: Podcast on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in Podcast on Hart Hoover

item.title: What's New in 2019
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: I wanted to blog quickly about what I’ve been up to lately, because 2018 was crazy (so I want to look back a little) and there’s stuff to look forward to in 2019. Yes I know it’s April, it’s taken a bit to figure it out which is understandable if you read on.
